home.headline: Find smarter stays in Montreal — better than Airbnb
home.subhead: Verified listings. Better pricing. AI-powered platform.
home.searchLabel: Search by city, address, or listing
home.searchPlaceholder: Search by city, address, or listing
home.emptyFeaturedBody: Explore available stays — start with Montreal or your city.

auth.signupBookingLeadIn: Create an account to continue booking — takes under a minute.
auth.signupGoogleSoon: More sign-in options (e.g. Google) coming soon.

search.heroSubtitle: Verified stays, smart picks, and clear totals before you pay.
search.placeholder: Search by city, address, or listing ID
search.alertsNote: Alerts: enable notifications in your account settings when we add email digests for saved BNHub searches.

sellerDeclaration.title: Seller Declaration
sellerDeclaration.declineConfirm: If you decline, this listing cannot be published until you complete the {title}. Continue?
sellerDeclaration.mustCompletePublishing: This listing cannot be published until you complete the {title}.

bookings.requestSent: Request sent — waiting for host to approve
bookings.manualPaymentBody: Online checkout is not enabled for this market. Coordinate payment directly with your host. They will confirm once payment is received.
bookings.totalDue: Total due · includes taxes & fees where applicable

admin.marketSettingsIntro: Control Syria-style manual booking, payments, and contact-first UX without forking the product.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.network: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
errors.forbidden: You don’t have access to this action.
errors.notFound: This content could not be found.
errors.validation: Please check the highlighted fields and try again.

ai.outputDisclaimer: AI-generated content may be inaccurate. Verify important details before acting or sending messages.
ai.assistantOff: AI assistant is turned off by platform settings.
ai.chatUnavailable: The AI service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again. Your message was saved; no automated action was taken.
ai.providerNotConfiguredSummary: AI provider is not configured. Use listing and booking pages for live status; contact support for refunds or disputes.
ai.chatEmptyState: Ask about this listing, bookings, or host operations. No fabricated metrics.

autopilot.listingOptimizationReadyDescription: Suggested title and description refresh. SEO ideas: {keywords}.
autopilot.listingOptimizationNotifyMessage: Open Autopilot to review suggested title and description improvements.
autopilot.listingAutoUpdatedMessage: Title and description were refreshed by Autopilot (safe mode). You can edit anytime.
autopilot.listingApprovalMessage: AI prepared listing updates. Approve or reject in Host Autopilot.
autopilot.pricingExperimentDescription: Current night rate (cents): {currentCents}. Suggested experiment: +3% ({suggestedCents} cents) if demand is strong — not applied automatically.
autopilot.pricingApprovalNotifyMessage: AI logged a pricing experiment for your review (no automatic price change).
autopilot.dynamicPricingIncreaseSummary: Signals show solid bookings or occupancy and limited open nights ahead. Consider a manual increase in the {minRate}–{maxRate} range (current ≈ {currentRate}); not applied automatically.
autopilot.dynamicPricingDecreaseSummary: Recent bookings are light and availability ahead is wide. Consider a manual review toward {minRate}–{maxRate} (current ≈ {currentRate}); not applied automatically.
autopilot.dynamicPricingQualityFirstSummary: Quality signals are weak while demand looks soft. Strengthen photos and description first; if you still adjust price, a manual review might land near {minRate}–{maxRate} (current ≈ {currentRate}) — suggestion only.
autopilot.guestDraftTemplate: Hi{guestGreeting}, thanks for booking “{listingTitle}”. I’m your host — let me know your estimated arrival time.
autopilot.guestDraftNotifyMessage: Review the suggested message before sending from your inbox.
autopilot.promotionIdeaDescription: Consider a short 5–7% midweek discount or a 3-night minimum with a small price break to lift occupancy. Promotions are not created automatically.
autopilot.promotionNotifyMessage: A non-binding discount idea is in Autopilot — no changes were made.
autopilot.stalledBookingRecDescription: Request for “{listingTitle}” has been pending since before {beforeDate}. Approve or decline to protect response time.
autopilot.stalledBookingNotifyMessage: A guest request for “{listingTitle}” needs a decision.
autopilot.payoutIncompleteDescription: Complete Stripe Connect to receive payouts. Autopilot will not change payout, refund, or banking settings.
autopilot.payoutNotifyMessage: Finish Stripe onboarding to get paid. AI did not modify any financial settings.
autopilot.lowBookingsDescription: No confirmed bookings in the last 90 days for “{listingTitle}”. Consider photos, pricing, and instant book.
autopilot.approvalAppliedNotifyMessage: Approved AI changes were applied where supported. Pricing still requires manual edits.
autopilot.approvalRecordedNotifyMessage: Approval saved; listing update could not be applied — check the listing in the editor.

revenue.listingQualityTitle: Improve listing quality to lift conversions
revenue.listingQualitySummary: Photos, description, or completeness scores are below typical converting listings. Strengthen the listing before running discounts.
revenue.listingQualityAction: Add photos, expand the description with amenities and house rules, and complete missing profile fields. Then revisit pricing and promotions.
revenue.copyRefreshSummary: No recent guest stays relative to listing age. Updating title, subtitle, and description can improve search relevance and trust.
revenue.copyRefreshAction: Rewrite the headline and first paragraph for clarity; highlight unique amenities and the neighborhood. No live pricing changes.
revenue.copyRefreshSummaryAlt: The listing has been quiet for an extended period. Pair quality improvements with an updated description and title.
revenue.copyRefreshActionAlt: Edit copy to reflect current amenities and photos. This is a recommendation only — no automatic publish.
revenue.promotionSummary: Recent booking volume is low. A short promotional window can increase visibility without changing your base nightly rate automatically.
revenue.promotionAction: Propose a modest, dated discount (for example midweek) in Host tools — Autopilot will not create or apply promotions without your approval where required.
revenue.pricingReviewSummary: Base rate is {rate} (minor units). Booking volume over the last 90 days is modest — consider a manual pricing review (no auto-apply).
revenue.pricingReviewAction: Compare to similar stays in your market and adjust night price or minimum stay in the listing editor if appropriate.

legal.shortDisclaimer: LECIPM provides software and marketplace tools only; nothing here is legal, tax, or investment advice.

market.syriaRibbon: Syria launch mode: contact-first booking; payments may be arranged offline per host policy.
market.contactFirstBanner: Questions first? Contact the host or ask a question before you complete a booking request.

glossary.reviewDisclaimer: Information is host-provided; availability and pricing are confirmed at booking.
glossary.localeFallbackNote: If a translated string is missing, English may appear for that fragment.

constraints.standardMarket: Standard market: describe booking flow accurately. Never guarantee availability, price, or payment without host and platform confirmation.
constraints.contactFirstMarket: Contact-first market: use “request to book”, “contact the host”, and manual confirmation language. Do not promise instant checkout or automated payment rails.

prompts.listingSeoSystem: You write accurate marketplace listing and SEO copy. Never invent amenities, legal claims, ratings, review counts, or distances not present in structured input.
prompts.cityPageSystem: You write localized city or neighborhood landing copy from verified inputs only. Do not invent statistics or market data.
prompts.hostCopySystem: You draft host-facing suggestions. Never change payout, tax, or legal obligations; never promise platform outcomes.
prompts.notificationCopySystem: You draft notification or in-app banner copy. Never assert payment captured, refunds issued, or dispute outcomes without explicit verified facts.

template.listingSeoDescriptionFallback: Explore stays in {place}. Details reflect host-provided information only.
template.cityIntro: Find places to stay with transparent host information. Availability and pricing are confirmed when you book.
template.cityFaqA1: Send a booking request or contact the host; they confirm details with you.
template.growthListingNoDescription: Listing is missing a guest-facing description.
template.growthWeakSeoTitle: SEO title could be clearer for search.
template.growthMissingLocaleCopy: Translated copy is missing for this locale.
template.growthSyriaBanner: Syria market: show contact-first banner on high-traffic pages.
template.hostNoAmenitiesLine: Add structured amenities in the listing editor so suggestions stay accurate.
template.hostWhyGuests: Suggested angle for “{title}”: emphasize what the host has already shared; avoid inventing features.
template.notificationBody: Open the app for details about {topic}. No payment or legal outcome is implied.
template.bannerContactFirstBody: Send a booking request or message the host. Confirmation and payment steps follow host and market rules — not instant checkout.
template.bannerStandardBody: Browse listings, compare options, and complete booking steps in the app.
template.investorSnippetBody: Unified platform for stays and real-estate workflows; launch markets may use contact-first booking and manual payment tracking.

optimization.weightedScores: Scores weight conversions > engagement > clicks. Adjust weights in code as analytics mature.
